query:
CREATE TABLE `ajoCircles` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`name` text NOT NULL,
	`creatorId` int NOT NULL,
	`contributionAmount` int NOT NULL,
	`frequency` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`maxMembers` int NOT NULL,
	`payoutOrder` text,
	`currentRound` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`totalRounds` int NOT NULL,
	`inviteCode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'waiting',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `ajoCircles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `ajoCircles_inviteCode_unique` UNIQUE(`inviteCode`)
);

CREATE TABLE `ajoContributions` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`circleId` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`roundNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`amount` int NOT NULL,
	`paidAt` timestamp,
	`status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `ajoContributions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `ajoMembers` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`circleId` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`joinedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `ajoMembers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `expenses` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`amount` int NOT NULL,
	`merchant` text NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`date` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`entryMethod` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`notes` text,
	`aiSoftComment` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `expenses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `savingsGoals` (
	`id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` text NOT NULL,
	`targetAmount` int NOT NULL,
	`currentAmount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`targetDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`coverTheme` varchar(50),
	`motivationNote` text,
	`status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `savingsGoals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`notes` text,
